Configuration for the deprecated ft2232 OpenOCD driver with specific VID, PID, and layout settings.

# Purpose
The configuration file sets parameters for the `ft2232` interface in OpenOCD. It specifies the vendor ID and product ID with `ft2232_vid_pid 0x0403 0x6010`, describes the device as "Dual RS232-HS" using `ft2232_device_desc`, and defines the layout as "usbjtag" with `ft2232_layout`. The file also sets the latency timer to 2 milliseconds using `ft2232_latency`. Note that the `ft2232` OpenOCD driver is marked as deprecated.
